projectDescription: A terminal UI that lets developers review AI agent-written code in real time — leaving line-level comments on diffs, submitting structured feedback, and watching the agent fix things immediately.
keyFeatures: Live diff viewer with unified and split (side-by-side) views, syntax highlighting, and intra-line diffs
Line-level structured comments tagged as issues, suggestions, notes, or praise
Plan & architecture review — agents can submit plans for human review before writing code
Push notifications via MCP channels (Claude Code) so feedback reaches the agent instantly
Pull-based feedback queue for agents without channel support (OpenCode, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI)
Pause flow — pause the agent mid-task to review before it proceeds
Suggested edits using GitHub-style suggestion blocks
Session persistence via SQLite, including submission history
Configurable keybindings and per-project config override
publicApiSurface: monocle review send-artifact --title T [--file F] [--id ID] [--type EXT] [--wait] [--json]
